notable_excerpts: There is 7,500 EV capacity, 3,000 is what we are roughly producing right now.
We expect 3 ICE products, two born electric products, and two LCV's in calendar year 2026.
If it does happen in 2027, about 25% of our portfolio will need to be there to meet the CAFE norm.
We work with multiple, firstly, we've set up, you know, team of our own about 200-300 people who work exclusively on this.
We have to be very cautious in the way we ramp up production. But over the last 40 days, we've also learned that we need to be as cautious on the delivery process with customers.
We are now pivoting them to ensure that there isn't a profit drain from those businesses and therefore the write offs.
We continue to be very disciplined in terms of what we do and where we go, and that discipline is something that would be evident in this acquisition.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted M&M's focus on expanding its electric vehicle capacity and meeting future emission norms, indicating a strong environmental commitment. Social aspects were addressed through supply chain management and cautious production ramp-up. Governance was emphasized through strategic pivots and disciplined risk management.
weaknesses: Limited specific details on social initiatives
